step_rationale: Autophagy initiation factor; transcript dysregulation linked to impaired ischemic autophagy.
mechanism: RB1CC1 is a core component of the ULK1 autophagy initiation complex; dysregulation impairs ischemia-reperfusion protection.

references.title: Leonurine improves atherosclerosis by activating foam cell autophagy and metabolic remodeling via METTL3-mediated AKT1S1 mRNA stability modulation.
references.journal: Phytomedicine : international journal of phytotherapy and phytopharmacology
